heading: Applicability of antidumping provisions and antitrust laws
label: 2033 Applicability of antidumping provisions and antitrust laws
text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed to affect or modify the provisions of subtitle B of title VII of the Tariff Act of 1930 [ et seq.] or of any of the antitrust laws as designated in .19 U.S.C. 1673section 12 of title 15
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 89–28379 Stat. 1016section 2001 of this titleOct. 21, 1965The Tariff Act of 1930, referred to in text, is , . Subtitle B of title VII of the Tariff Act of 1930 is classified generally to part II of subtitle IV (§ 1673 et seq.) of chapter 4 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 590section 1654 of this title
